target.title: fix(diagnostics): drop snake case OTel ids
target.body:
## Summary
- rejects the old broad per-message tracing shape and keeps only the concrete privacy/cardinality gap
- drops snake_case diagnostic identifier attributes alongside the existing camelCase OTel drop list
- adds focused redaction coverage and an unreleased changelog entry crediting @Lion0710

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- remote proof attempted but blocked before test execution: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm test:serial extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts"` failed because Blacksmith is not authenticated
- direct AWS Crabbox fallback attempted but blocked before test execution: `../crabbox/bin/crabbox run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm test:serial extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts"` failed because AWS credentials/IMDS role are unavailable

Behavior addressed: OTel redaction dropped camelCase diagnostic ids but could still export snake_case variants for run, session, message, chat, trace, span, and tool-call identifiers.
Real environment tested: not completed; both permitted remote runners are blocked before command execution in this environment.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; autoreview command listed above; remote Crabbox/Testbox commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: focused redaction coverage is included in `extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts`; autoreview is clean.
Observed result after fix: static diff check and autoreview pass; remote runtime proof is blocked by runner auth/credentials.
What was not tested: the focused Vitest file and `pnpm check:changed` were not run because local testing is disallowed for this task and remote runners are unavailable.
